MongoDB Connected System

MongoDB Connected System for Appian¶

Rob Munroe, Principal Solutions Architect, Appian Corporation

Version 1.2

This plugin implements an Appian Connected System for MongoDB using the MongoDB Java Driver in synchronous mode. It provides Appian with a low-code integration to MongoDB without the developer (or designer in Appian parlance) needing to understand or work with the MongoDB REST API. It also includes many conveniences such as date/time and MongoDB custom type handling (ObjectIds, Binary, etc.), as well as a full suite of JSON Query Expression Functions to construct MongoDB Query Documents (their JSON-based query language) via Appian expressions, instead of tedious, manual string building.

The official plugin JAR distribution location is this entry in the Appian Community App Market.

Important

It is strongly recommended that you read at least the Introduction section before attempting to use the plugin in an application.
